channel.title: Pattern Parsing on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Pattern Parsing on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Sentinel TI - improved pattern parsing & revoke reliability
item.description:
Sentinel TI is now generally available with two updates: improved pattern parsing accuracy and a fix for revoke actions so they apply reliably. The change is meant to improve control in pattern-based workflows.

  • Source: Azure Updates
